## 🔒 Security Checklist
<!-- Security considerations for industrial platform -->

- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in logs or responses
- [ ] Input validation implemented where applicable
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checks in place
- [ ] OWASP security guidelines followed
- [ ] No new security vulnerabilities introduced
- [ ] Dependency security audit passed
- [ ] Data encryption considerations addressed

## ♿ Accessibility Checklist
<!-- WCAG AA compliance requirements -->

- [ ] Semantic HTML structure maintained
- [ ] ARIA labels and descriptions provided
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards
- [ ] Keyboard navigation works properly
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility verified
- [ ] Focus indicators are visible
- [ ] Alternative text provided for images

## 📱 Industrial/Field Worker Considerations
<!-- Special considerations for industrial equipment users -->

- [ ] Mobile-friendly for field workers
- [ ] Works in low-connectivity environments
- [ ] High contrast mode support for outdoor use
- [ ] Touch targets are appropriately sized (44px+)
- [ ] Loading states for slow network conditions
- [ ] Offline functionality maintained
